name: DNS Query for Anonfiles.com Domain - DNS Client
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: DNS Query for Anonfiles.com Domain - DNS Client
SIGMA Description: Detects DNS queries for anonfiles.com, which is an anonymous file upload platform often used for malicious purposes

False positives:
- Rare legitimate access to anonfiles.com

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=3008 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.anonfiles.com%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY DNS Query for Anonfiles.com Domain - DNS Client on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=3008 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%.anonfiles.com%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: DNS Query for Anonfiles.com Domain - DNS Client
